content.fact_text: Implementation of the AuthService class providing production-grade authentication flow, rate limiting, and session generation.

provenance_data.behaviour: The AuthService provides secure credential verification, rate-limited login orchestration, and session management using Redis for state and PostgreSQL for user data. It utilizes Argon2id for password hashing and standard JWT for session tokens.
interfaces: verifyCredentials(email: string, password: string, ipAddress: string): Promise<string>
login(userId: string, ipAddress: string, userAgent: string): Promise<{ mfaRequired: boolean; sessionId?: string; token?: string }>
provenance_data.utility: Orchestrates secure authentication workflows including Argon2id credential validation and Redis-based rate limiting.
